ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dashboard */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the dashboard */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization component */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the component belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., table, chart, map) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used by the component */,
  "options" TEXT /* Display options for the component */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate derived values */,
  "x_position" INTEGER /* X-position of the component on the dashboard */,
  "y_position" INTEGER /* Y-position of the component on the dashboard */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the component */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_components_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_components_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., database, API, data warehouse) */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string to the data source */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the data source */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the data source */,
  "host" TEXT /* Host of the data source */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port of the data source */,
  "database" TEXT /* Database name of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization component */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caches" (
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache entry */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data" TEXT /* Cached data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the cache entry was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date the cache entry expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caches_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, create, update) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., dashboard, component, data source) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_permissions_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization component */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_permissions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES visualization_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., dashboard, component) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., dashboard, component) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "revision" TEXT /* Revision text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
